---
title: "Dental Workforce Supply Rather Than Surgical Demand Drives Regional Disparities in Perioperative Oral Care: A Prefectural Ecological Analysis Using Japanese NDB Open Data"
format:
  docx:
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
bibliography: ../references.bib
csl: ../vancouver.csl
---

{{< include ../core/manuscript_core.qmd >}}

{{< include ../includes/submission_journal_notes.qmd >}}
